SEARCH
Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type

Interface ClassValidator<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of the class
All Superinterfaces:
ObjectPart<ClassValidator<T>,Class<T>>, Validator<ClassValidator<T>>
public interface ClassValidator<T> extends Validator<ClassValidator<T>>, ObjectPart<ClassValidator<T>,Class<T>>
Validates the state of a Class value.

NOTE: Methods in this class throw or record exceptions under the conditions specified in their Javadoc. However, the actual exception type that is thrown or recorded may be different from what the Javadoc indicates, depending on the value of the ConfigurationUpdater.exceptionTransformer(Function) setting. This allows users to customize the exception handling behavior of the class.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClassValidator<T>
    isSubtypeOf(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the value is a subclass or subinterface of type.
    ClassValidator<T>
    isSupertypeOf(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the value is a superclass or superinterface of type.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.part.ObjectPart

    getValue, getValueOrDefault, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotSameReferenceAs, isNull, isSameReferenceAs

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.type.part.Validator

    and, apply, asString, configuration, elseGetException, elseGetFailures, elseGetMessages, elseThrow, getContext, getContextAsString, getName, withContext

  • Method Details

    • isSupertypeOf

      ClassValidator<T> isSupertypeOf(Class<?> type)
      Ensures that the value is a superclass or superinterface of type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type to compare to
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value or type are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is not a supertype of type

    • isSubtypeOf

      ClassValidator<T> isSubtypeOf(Class<?> type)
      Ensures that the value is a subclass or subinterface of type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type to compare to
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the value or type are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is not a subtype of type
